---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: Olayiwolaaa
---

## What problem does this solve?

Describe the problem or gap you've identified. Focus on the problem, not your proposed solution — we want to understand the need first.

## Proposed Solution

What would you like to see built or changed? Be as specific as you can.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you thought about other ways to solve this? Why is your proposed approach better?

## Is this related to the Roadmap?

- [ ] Yes — this is a roadmap item (link the relevant phase/item):
- [ ] No — this is a new idea not currently on the roadmap

## Additional Context

Mockups, references, links to similar implementations, or anything else that would help evaluate this request.
